doctor_description: Mild centrilobular emphysema, more pronounced in upper lobes
validator_description: Severe centrilobular emphysema (upper lobes more), moderate paraseptal emphysema
management_impact: No immediate management change — severity label difference does not trigger different workup
notes: Doctor significantly undergraded emphysema severity; missed paraseptal component. No management change since workup focus is on the suspicious RUL nodule.

validator_description: Solid nodule with thin peripheral linear bands, no change, image 112
management_impact: No management change — stable nodule per Fleischner requires no follow-up, but omission is noted
notes: Doctor omits this stable LUL solid nodule (image 112) while documenting the adjacent calcified lesion (image 111). No clinical consequence given the dominant concern is the growing RUL nodule.

doctor_description: Solid nodule increased to 2.3×1.7cm (prev 1.8×1.6cm), spiculated, band to costal pleura — suspicious neoplasm, PET/CT/biopsy recommended
validator_description: Solid spiculated nodule increased to 2.3×1.7cm; GGO periphery increased in number and size — suspicious neoplasm, same recommendation
management_impact: None — both recommend tissue verification
notes: Validator adds peripheral GGO detail (additional concerning feature) but management recommendation is concordant.

doctor_description: Right pleural effusion 1.8cm layer, previously absent
validator_description: Right pleural effusion 1.8cm, previously absent
management_impact: None
notes: Fully concordant.

doctor_description: Thoracic aorta dilated 4.2cm — aneurysmal dilation of ascending aorta
validator_description: Thoracic aorta dilated 4.2cm — dilation of ascending aorta
management_impact: None — same size, same clinical significance; 'aneurysmal' vs 'dilation' is semantic at 4.2cm
notes: Minor stylistic difference in terminology. No clinical management difference.

doctor_description: Pulmonary trunk dilated 3.3cm (findings); impression states 3.4cm
validator_description: Pulmonary trunk dilated 3.4cm
management_impact: None — minor measurement discrepancy; same clinical conclusion (possible pulmonary hypertension)
notes: Doctor has internal inconsistency (3.3 vs 3.4cm); aligns with validator's 3.4cm in impression.

doctor_description: Moderate degenerative changes thoracic spine + osteophytes
validator_description: Severe degenerative changes thoracic spine + osteophytes
management_impact: None — severity label difference; no intervention triggered from chest CT
notes: Characterization discrepancy in spine severity. No management change.

doctor_description: Moderate coronary calcification noted; pacemaker placement
validator_description: Moderate coronary calcification
management_impact: None — both document moderate CAC; PCP referral not explicitly stated by either in this study's impression
notes: Concordant on CAC documentation. Neither includes PCP referral language in impression but this is equally absent from both reports.

finding_category: RML nodule — solid vs part-solid characterization
doctor_description: 4mm solid subpleural nodule RML with subtle increase — CT follow-up in 12 months per Fleischner
validator_description: 4mm part-solid subpleural nodule RML with increase <1mm — no routine follow-up; if high-risk, CT at 2 and 4 years
management_impact: Doctor applies solid nodule Fleischner algorithm (CT 12m); validator correctly applies part-solid algorithm (no routine follow-up). Schedules unnecessary annual CT.
notes: Critical characterization error: solid vs part-solid determines Fleischner pathway. Doctor incorrectly applies solid algorithm for part-solid nodule. MIPS 364 violation — incorrect follow-up interval stated.

doctor_description: Persistent reticular opacity supradiaphragmatic portions both lungs — likely atelectatic changes
validator_description: Thickening interlobular interstitium lung bases unchanged; peribronchial GGOs lower lobes unchanged — may be associated with heart disease or interstitial changes
management_impact: Validator raises possible interstitial lung disease or cardiac etiology; doctor dismisses as atelectasis. Unchanged findings limit urgency, but characterization difference matters for follow-up framing.
notes: Doctor oversimplifies interstitial thickening + GGOs as 'likely atelectatic.' Validator appropriately considers interstitial/cardiac etiology. No immediate management change since stable.

doctor_description: Pulmonary trunk dilated 3.2cm — may suggest PAH
validator_description: Pulmonary trunk dilated 3.9cm — may suggest PAH
management_impact: Both conclude possible PAH; 3.9cm is more significantly dilated. No immediate workup change but severity differs.
notes: Large measurement discrepancy (0.7cm). Both reach same qualitative conclusion. No management change triggered but severity characterization differs.

validator_description: 3mm calcified granuloma middle lobe, no follow-up required
management_impact: None — no follow-up required for calcified granuloma
notes: Doctor omits incidental calcified granuloma. No clinical consequence.

validator_description: Hemangioma in T12 vertebral body, no follow-up required
management_impact: None — hemangioma requires no follow-up
notes: Doctor omits T12 hemangioma noted by validator. Clinically insignificant omission.

validator_description: Degenerative changes of the shoulder joints
management_impact: None — incidental finding on chest CT
notes: Doctor omits shoulder joint findings noted by validator. No management impact from chest CT.

doctor_description: Previously identified LLL nodule no longer seen — complete regression
validator_description: Previously identified LLL nodule no longer seen — complete regression
management_impact: None
notes: Fully concordant.

doctor_description: Moderate coronary calcification + PCP referral
validator_description: Moderate coronary calcification + PCP referral
management_impact: None
notes: Concordant. ACRad44 satisfied by both.

doctor_description: No nodules requiring follow-up per Fleischner Society recommendations
validator_description: No nodules requiring follow-up per Fleischner Society recommendations
management_impact: None
notes: Fully concordant.

doctor_description: Right anterolateral wall diverticulum upper third trachea up to 4mm
validator_description: Right anterolateral wall diverticulum upper third trachea up to 4mm
management_impact: None
notes: Fully concordant.

doctor_description: Residual thymic tissue noted in anterior mediastinum
management_impact: None — residual thymic tissue is a normal variant; no management change
notes: Doctor mentions residual thymic tissue; validator omits. Clinically insignificant finding in expected location.

validator_description: T11 bone islands, clinically insignificant
management_impact: None — bone islands are clinically insignificant
notes: Doctor omits T11 bone islands. Clinically insignificant incidental finding.

doctor_description: Mild degenerative changes thoracic spine with subchondral sclerosis
management_impact: None — minor stylistic omission by validator
notes: Doctor documents mild spine changes; validator omits. Clinically insignificant.

doctor_description: Plate-like atelectasis in right upper lobe
validator_description: Linear atelectasis in RUL against background of secretion in small bronchus (images 98-102)
management_impact: Validator identifies bronchial secretion as contributing cause; may suggest bronchitis/infection. No specific management change required but adds clinical context.
notes: Doctor describes simple plate-like atelectasis; validator identifies bronchial secretion underlying it. Minor characterization difference with limited management impact.

validator_description: Walls of subsegmental bronchi minimally thickened
management_impact: None — minimal finding consistent with mild bronchitis; no specific treatment indicated from CT
notes: Doctor omits mild bronchial wall thickening noted by validator. No management change.

doctor_description: Single 2mm calcification in right breast, noted in impression
management_impact: None — no follow-up recommended by doctor; benign-appearing single calcification
notes: Doctor notes right breast calcification; validator omits. Doctor does not recommend additional imaging, which is appropriate.

doctor_description: Mild coronary calcification + PCP referral
validator_description: Mild coronary calcification + PCP referral
management_impact: None
notes: Concordant. ACRad44 satisfied by both.

doctor_description: Calcified granuloma RLL up to 2mm
validator_description: Calcified granuloma RLL up to 2mm, no follow-up required
management_impact: None
notes: Concordant. Validator explicitly states no follow-up.

doctor_description: Cholecystectomy
validator_description: Cholecystectomy
management_impact: None
notes: Concordant.

doctor_description: Moderate centrilobular and paraseptal emphysema — no LDCT recommendation
validator_description: Moderate centrilobular and paraseptal emphysema — consider enrollment in LDCT lung cancer screening; today's CT may serve as baseline
management_impact: Doctor omits LDCT screening recommendation for emphysema patient — QMM23 MIPS violation. No immediate diagnostic workup change but screening opportunity missed.
notes: Doctor identifies emphysema but fails to recommend LDCT screening per QMM23. Validator correctly adds screening recommendation. MIPS measure QMM23 not satisfied by doctor.

doctor_description: Solid micronodules both lungs up to 3mm, no change
validator_description: Centrilobular micronodules and ground-glass nodules up to 3mm — may represent smoking-related disease (respiratory bronchiolitis)
management_impact: None — no follow-up change for <3mm nodules regardless of solid vs GGN classification
notes: Minor characterization difference. Validator distinguishes GGN component and attributes to respiratory bronchiolitis. No management change.

validator_description: Significant thickening of walls of subsegmental bronchi including upper lobes — corresponds to bronchitis
management_impact: None — clinical finding consistent with smoking history; no specific CT-directed management change
notes: Doctor omits significant bronchial wall thickening noted by validator. No immediate management change but finding represents active bronchitis.

doctor_description: Part-solid subpleural nodule RLL 6mm, decreased from 1.4×0.8cm; CT 3-6 months to confirm persistence, then annual CT for 5 years
validator_description: Part-solid subpleural nodule RLL 6mm, decreased; may have inflammatory etiology; part-solid nodules may resolve; Fleischner follow-up appropriate
management_impact: None — both recommend follow-up CT; concordant management
notes: Both concordant on follow-up CT for this part-solid nodule. Validator adds inflammatory etiology consideration.

doctor_description: Severe coronary calcification + PCP referral
validator_description: Severe coronary calcification + PCP referral
management_impact: None
notes: Concordant. ACRad44 satisfied by both.

doctor_description: Dilation ascending thoracic aorta up to 4.0cm, severe wall calcification
validator_description: Dilation ascending thoracic aorta 4.0cm, severe wall calcification

notes: Concordant.
